name: The Jianghu Ascendant: A Heavenly Dao Chronicle
description:
USE DEEPSEEK OR ANOTHER HIGH CONTEXT LLM PROXY, DISLIKES REGARDING PROXY ISSUES WILL BE DELETED

Also, like I’ve been doing recently you are not introduced, you are not defined. You choose who you are and what happens, I see a lot of people confused with how you start these roleplays. It’s simple. (*I step in from behind* “Junior sister, should I accompany you to meet the envoys together?”) Boom you’re her senior brother for the rest of the roleplay. For anyone who wants to continue their story from Hua Qingmei’s roleplay just like in my recent two part roleplay, if you simply talk to her in the opening message and reference the past you can continue on, even greeting her as your wife if you ended up marrying her should also work. Just make sure to include any details she should remember, as you are undefined the AI will use your message and your persona definition to add your character to the world.

This is a MASSIVE roleplay, so give feedback about any bugs and if it works for you not including JLLM users. I decided to give this a try since I saw a roleplay with fairly positive responses that had over 40k tokens. There are WAY too many named characters for me to name them all on the intro page. The upper universe and the Demonic Lotus Sect aren’t defined in detail in this roleplay as they will each have their own roleplays coming in the future so I don’t recommend interacting with those factions. One of my personas is in this, but he’s not a front facing character like in other roleplay, he’s simply a side character in the world and even then he doesn’t play an active role in the lower realms. If you want to learn about him you can probably end up meeting him or learning about him if you look into Ji Xuechen at the Northern Sea Ice palace, but he shouldn’t interact with the world as he’s set that he only visits once every 500 - 1000 years after creating the ice palace. Also a returning character in this is Hua Qingmei, but she is now in her 30s and is an elder in Mount Hua so it’s been around 20 years since that roleplay. I can’t include all of the characters appearances in the profile image so I will only choose a few, but this is created to be a vibrant living Jianghu roleplay, I hope you guys can have some fun with it.

Step into the Jianghu, a vibrant, tumultuous martial world governed by the immutable laws of the Heavenly Dao. Here, cultivators strive for power, sects clash for supremacy, and every choice ripples with profound consequence. Will you master ancient martial arts, navigate perilous political currents, or seek the elusive path to immortality in a realm where even emotions can be a weapon? Your legend begins now, where power is earned, not given, and the world truly breathes around you.

Welcome to The Jianghu Ascendant: A Heavenly Dao Chronicle

Prepare to embark on an unparalleled journey into a truly living, breathing martial world. The Jianghu Ascendant is a deep, highly immersive AI roleplay experience where your decisions hold real weight, your power is earned through arduous cultivation, and the world itself reacts and evolves around your actions. Governed by the omnipresent Heavenly Dao, this chronicle offers a challenging and richly detailed Wuxia experience unlike any other.

The World: The Jianghu & Beyond

Our primary focus lies within the Jianghu, a single, vibrant speck in a cosmos teeming with millions of realms. This lower realm is a crucible of martial arts, honor, and hidden dangers, where both mortals and nascent cultivators strive for supremacy.

* The Righteous Alliance: The bulwark of the Jianghu, comprised of numerous orthodox sects committed to upholding justice and protecting the innocent.

* Mount Hua Sect: Masters of the elegant and deadly Plum Blossom Sword Arts. (Key Figure: Hu
creator: Qjfavf
